title: 预加载状态
completionRule: Complete only when every legacy current-page, memory-pool and nearby-page cache field, the frozen queue/priority/cancel scope, shared GUI/CLI/TUI plan and telemetry contract, inactive-zero-work lifecycle, desktop/constrained geometry, active-media stability and deferred chunk budget have automated evidence; browser predecode, server presentation cache and preload-plan telemetry must remain separately labelled.

sourceUiInventory.title: 内存使用量与进度
acceptanceItems: lockedCount 或 lease 替代语义明确

sourceUiInventory.title: 附近页缓存格
acceptanceItems: 查询不得读取或解码页面内容

sourceUiInventory.title: 刷新、同步与迟到结果
acceptanceItems: memory 与 status 并行请求

sourceUiInventory.title: 空、部分、错误与失败状态
acceptanceItems: 仅服务端 diagnostics 可用
错误不泄漏路径或 token
server cached 与 cold 不和 browser ready 与 failed 混称

sourceUiInventory.title: 队列、优先级与控制扩展
acceptanceItems: 取消当前 session speculative work
清理当前 session retained cache
不得清理其他 session 或全局缩略图
GUI CLI TUI 同一命令语义

sourceUiInventory.title: 通用 Card 外壳
acceptanceItems: visible expanded order height 持久化

sourceUiInventory.title: 三层共享数据链
acceptanceItems: GUI CLI TUI 字段语义一致

items.title: 显示当前页与总页数
items.targetContract: The active frame anchor is displayed as a 1-based current page with the session book total; a zero-page book renders 0 / 0 without starting preload work.
items.notes: The React Card derives this field from the active session frame and book snapshot; before a session it keeps the legacy 0 / 0 summary shell resident, while Chromium covers both the empty and active states.

items.title: 显示服务端呈现缓存容量
items.targetContract: The Card displays server-owned presentation cache entries, bytes, maximum bytes, usage and leases from the shared diagnostics snapshot without presenting the browser predecode retained limit as the legacy memory pool.
items.notes: The browser DTO and Card render server presentation entries, bytes, maxBytes, usage and active leases separately from the bounded browser predecode store; scripted 1920x1080 Chromium proves the lease metric and normal desktop sidebar geometry, while complete status still requires CLI/TUI presentation.

items.title: 保持内存与百分比格式
items.targetContract: Bytes use the legacy 1024 thresholds and B/KB/MB/GB labels, usage renders one decimal place, and missing or zero-capacity metrics degrade without invalid percentages.
items.notes: The React Card freezes byte thresholds, one-decimal usage and invalid-value degradation; CLI/TUI text projection remains pending.

items.title: 显示有界附近页窗口
items.targetContract: The Card renders at most nine stable page-index tiles spanning three pages behind through five pages ahead, clamped to book boundaries and queried without loading page content.
items.notes: The Card renders the clamped three-behind/five-ahead window without loading page content, overlays bounded browser events and passes scripted 1920x1080 Chromium geometry evidence at the normal right-sidebar width.

items.title: 区分服务端缓存与浏览器预解码状态
items.targetContract: Server current/cached/cold truth and browser loading/ready/failed predecode state are separately labelled; a page may expose both layers without one being inferred from the other.
items.notes: The session-scoped diagnostics view projects only bounded page indexes and current-generation preload outcomes: ready is labelled cached, started remains server-loading, failed stays failed, and missing/cancelled/evicted entries are cold. The React nearby grid displays that server layer alongside independent browser loading/ready/failed state without exposing page IDs or paths; CLI/TUI projection remains pending.

items.title: 显示预读队列、优先级与 admission
items.targetContract: The Card truthfully exposes visible, near, ahead, background and separately owned thumbnail work together with normal, reduced and paused admission from the shared scheduler and preload plan.
items.notes: The Card renders aggregated near/ahead/background candidates from shared diagnostics; admission, current-visible ownership and thumbnail ownership remain pending and must stay distinct from browser predecode.

items.title: 取消当前会话预读并清理保留缓存
items.targetContract: Explicit actions cancel only current-session speculative work or release current-session retained presentations with pending, disabled, confirmation, error and rollback states while preserving the visible frame and unrelated consumers.
items.notes: XR replaces the legacy global primitives with confirmed current-session actions: cancel publishes a paused empty generation and resumes on navigation, while release trims only non-visible retained presentations. Core, HTTP, client, browser cancellation, two-session isolation, confirmation, rollback and active-image stability are covered; CLI/TUI commands and keyboard focus evidence remain pending.

items.title: 刷新状态并拒绝迟到结果
items.targetContract: Activation and frame changes update immediately, browser predecode remains event-driven, diagnostics sample at most once every two seconds while active, and retry aborts any superseded request.
items.notes: The Card refreshes diagnostics immediately and at most once per two seconds while mounted, aborts on frame/session changes, exposes sanitized retry, and proves zero polling while collapsed in the scripted desktop flow.

items.title: 加载、空、部分、错误、重试与释放状态
items.targetContract: Diagnostics and browser predecode failures degrade independently through stable loading, empty, partial, error, retry and disposed states without showing stale previous-session metrics.
items.notes: The Card covers loading, resident pre-session, empty/zero-page, partial diagnostics, sanitized error, retry and disposed browser-event states. Diagnostics are owned by sessionId: same-session refresh/errors retain the latest value, while a new session synchronously projects empty metrics until its own snapshot arrives and obsolete requests cannot publish.

items.title: 保持共享 Card 外壳行为
items.targetContract: Preload Status remains independently lazy, hideable, dockable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable with its Loader icon, Info Panel default and visible/expanded defaults.
items.notes: The shared shell, source-verified Loader header icon, lazy registry, resident pre-session body and collapse zero-DOM lifecycle are gated. The base Card is a 7,709-byte deferred chunk and its action controller is a separate 2,368-byte second-level chunk; independent CardWindow chrome remains owned by the shared window migration.

items.title: 共享有界 preload 与 diagnostics DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share one versioned, path-free contract for session generation, plan, telemetry, bounded performance metrics and server cache capacity with cancellation and stale-result semantics.
items.notes: The browser DTO now consumes the shared diagnostics preload tiers and presentation capacity without a second endpoint; session plan/admission detail and explicit CLI/TUI Card projection remain pending.

items.title: 仅在激活时工作并释放所有观察者
items.targetContract: Hidden, collapsed and unmounted Cards perform no subscriptions or polling; session and frame generation changes abort obsolete requests, and session close clears browser state and server telemetry.
items.notes: Store unsubscribe, diagnostics polling cancellation on unmount/session/frame change, synchronous cross-session state isolation, browser clear and core close are covered; full session-close integration evidence remains pending.

items.title: 仅持久化共享 Card 布局
items.targetContract: Preload plans, cache snapshots and telemetry are never persisted; only panel, visible, expanded, order and height use canonical [nodes.neoview] Card layout, with no Reader business data written to xiranite.db or a second NeoView database.
items.notes: The Card has no content settings or legacy persistence key.

items.title: 提供语义状态与键盘等价操作
items.targetContract: Named metric and nearby-page groups, a semantic progressbar, polite synchronization feedback and native stateful action buttons provide stable keyboard and screen-reader operation with focus preserved after retry, cancel and clear.
items.notes: The Card exposes named summary/nearby/queue/action groups, a semantic progressbar, live status, native retry/cancel buttons and a confirmed release dialog. Full keyboard focus-return evidence remains pending.

items.title: 保持旧版密度与响应式几何
items.targetContract: The two-column summary, compact memory meter, three-column nearby grid and current/cached/cold hierarchy remain readable without overlap or horizontal overflow in a common 1920x1080 desktop viewport and its approximately 320px sidebar.
items.notes: Scripted Playwright characterization compares the legacy CardWindow and XR Reader at 1920x1080. The resident harness now verifies the legacy two-column empty summary before opening, while the active target verifies compact labels, memory meter, nearby grid and server/browser state hierarchy; independent-window pixel parity remains pending.

items.title: 状态观察与控制不重挂活动媒体
items.targetContract: Event updates, diagnostics refresh, retry, cancel and clear preserve the active Reader media node and asset URL and issue zero duplicate requests for the active asset.
items.notes: Scripted 1920x1080 Chromium proves diagnostics refresh, cancel, confirmed release and collapse/reopen preserve the active image node and issue zero duplicate requests for its exact asset URL. Video-node evidence remains pending.

items.title: 有界 DOM、请求、内存与 chunk
items.targetContract: The Card keeps at most nine nearby tiles and O(1) metrics, bounded event snapshots, at most one diagnostics sample per two seconds only while active, zero hidden work, no page decode or thumbnail blob reads, and an independent deferred chunk under 8 KiB outside Reader entry and sidebar base chunks.
items.notes: The browser store and DOM are bounded, session-scoped cache outcomes contain only the current generation's candidate page indexes, diagnostics poll at most once per two seconds only while mounted, and exact active-asset requests remain unchanged in the scripted 1920x1080 flow. The base Card is 7,709 bytes and action UI is a separate 2,368-byte chunk; the full Reader performance gate remains pending.

items.title: 记录 XR 三层状态、激活采样与安全控制扩展
items.targetContract: Document that legacy Tauri memory/cache polling is replaced by authenticated shared diagnostics, session preload plan/telemetry and a separately labelled browser predecode event store; polling is active-only, errors are sanitized and retryable, queue/admission/cancel/clear controls are frozen-scope extensions, cancel and clear are current-session scoped, and only Card layout is persisted.
items.notes: The implementation and checklist explicitly separate server presentation cache, aggregate preload telemetry and bounded browser predecode; it preserves the three-behind/five-ahead window, uses active-only sanitized diagnostics, persists no telemetry and reserves cancel/clear for a future session-scoped contract.
